name: Compy (Y Combinator)
description: Compy (Y Combinator) — AI-powered API integration assistant that generates and explains code for third-party service connections.

seo.title: Compy (Y Combinator) — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Compy (Y Combinator): Compy (Y Combinator) — AI-powered API integration assistant that generates and explains code for third-party service connections.

when_to_use: Generating API integration code for third-party services instantly
Onboarding to unfamiliar APIs with AI-explained code examples
Reducing integration time with AI-generated connector snippets
Debugging third-party API calls with AI explanation and fixes

review.verdict: A specialized Copilot for API glue work; hard to justify as a separate subscription.
review.best_for: Freelancers and consultants hopping between client APIs
review.not_for: Teams already productive with Copilot or Cursor for general coding
